aerial.name: Aerial
aerial.description: Fly over mountains, rivers, sea zones, and enemy territories

anti_cavalry.name: Anti-Cavalry
anti_cavalry.description: For each enemy cavalry unit, one anti-cavalry unit gains +1 attack/defense

archer.name: Archer
archer.description: Defending archers pre-fire before round 1 of combat, with a -1 defense penalty except when defending a stronghold or fortress

captain.name: Captain
captain.description: Grant +1 attack/defense boost to up to 3 units of the same unit type (infantry, archer, cavalry, etc.)

charging.name: Charging
charging.description: Conquer multiple territories in combat path

ford_crosser.name: Ford Crosser
ford_crosser.description: Can cross rivers at a ford and bring up to 2 units with it

home.name: Home
home.description: Deploy up to 1 unit per turn in its home territory without a camp

ladder.name: Ladder
ladder.description: Allows up to 2 attacking infantry to bypass stronghold HP and direct hits at defending units

ram.name: Ram
ram.description: Roll against stronghold HP with siegeworks before standard combat rounds

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.description: If everyone in attack has stealth, they pre-fire with a -1 attack penalty and cancel any defensive archer prefire

terror.name: Terror
terror.description: Force 1 defending hit in round 1 of combat to re-roll (capped at 3 applied per battle)
